title: codereview-pass3: coap_dtn.c does not integrate SenML for payloads as required by parent; storage is raw memcpy without senml_encode/decode
description: P2 correctness: Parent requires SenML for payloads. Use senml_encode_* functions for DTN data. Current storage ignores SenML. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-88rm
close_reason: Fixed register with oscore_init first per AGENTS.md graph, added SenML pack + DTN buffer setup (static, no alloc), replaced payload memcpy with senml_encode_cbor in post handler. CMake+header+coap_dtn.c updated. West build for senml/coap succeeded. 3 codereview passes converged with all P0-P4 addressed and filed. Conventional commit done.
